TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Petro_Poroshenko, title = Petro_Poroshenko, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petro_Poroshenko} }

S.FORM: Petro Poroshenko 9 bulad 26 demiad, Petro Poroshenko, u misingkiway. 1965 a mihca nalecuhan) u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) nu Ukraine ayza sa ci Petro Poroshenko, micakat a demiad sa i 2014 a mihca 6 bulad 7 demiad. His presidential term ended on 20 May 2019.
S.PHON: p…ôtro porosńß…ônko * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, p…ôtro porosńß…ônko, u misiŇčkiwaj. **** a mińß ¶a nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan) u tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ ( ¶oŇčtuŇč) nu ukrain…ô ajza sa ¶i p…ôtro porosńß…ônko, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a mińß ¶a * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad. ńßis pr…ôsid…ôntiar~…ĺ t…ôrm …ônd…ôd on ** maj ****.
